examples: Not only the coloring genes, but lots of other genes are getting mixed up, too.
What we did in our ancestry was to produce more permanent natural coloring in our skin cells.
Add four drops of red food coloring to the water above the hot cup and four drops of blue food coloring to the water above the cold cup.
Albinism reveals itself through a lack of melanin or coloring in the skin, hair and eyes.
The new efforts go far beyond coloring books at check-in and teddy bears at turndown.
